layers.note: Temporary basins/biomes only; incorrect provisional Lake Azur river traces were removed. Verified water lives in data/water-features.json.
Inland water polygons extracted from terrain-data/water_mask.png; ocean/edge-connected water excluded.
Forest, desert, ice, and mountain polygons extracted from existing terrain-data mask rasters.
